title: Noobs & Legends
description: This modpack features a carefully curated selection of mods specifically designed for the "Noobs & Legends" Minecraft server. It offers a diverse gameplay experience, blending adventure, technology, and building elements to enhance the server experience.
body:
# **Noobs & Legends Server Modpack**
### _Explore. Build. Conquer. — A rich world full of dungeons, soundscapes, and visual immersion._

## 🗺️ Overview
**Noobs & Legends** transforms Minecraft into a living, breathing world filled with atmospheric sound, reworked structures, and improved building options.  
Perfect for players who love exploration, adventure, and base-building without breaking the vanilla feeling.

## ⚔️ Core Features

### 🏰 **Dungeons & Exploration**
- **Dungeons+** and **Dungeons & Taverns (All Overhauls)**  
  Completely redesigns every major vanilla structure — from **Strongholds** and **Ocean Monuments** to **Nether Fortresses** and **Woodland Mansions** — packed with secrets, puzzles, and powerful loot.  
  Every journey feels fresh again.

### 💎 **Advanced Progression**
- **Advanced Netherite**  
  Upgrade your Netherite gear even further with new alloys and powerful effects for true endgame adventurers.

### 🧱 **Creative Building**
- **Macaw’s Mods (Roofs, Windows, Doors, Fences, Paintings)**  
  Expand your architectural creativity with countless new blocks and decorations — perfect for castles, villages, or cozy mountain bases.
- **Storage Drawers**  
  Bring order to your storage rooms with customizable drawer systems and visual item indicators.

### 🌋 **Visual & Audio Immersion**
- **Iris Shaders** + **Sodium**  
  Enjoy beautiful lighting, realistic water reflections, and optimized performance.
- **Ambient Sounds** & **Sound Physics Remastered**  
  Deep, realistic sound environments: echoing caves, immersive weather, and life-like ambience.
- **Visuality** & **Scalable Lux**  
  Subtle visual particles and improved dynamic lighting bring depth to every scene.

### 🎮 **Gameplay Comfort**
- **AppleSkin** – Displays hunger and saturation bars clearly.  
- **Inventory Profiles Next** – Save, sort, and manage your inventory layouts efficiently.  
- **RightClickHarvest** – Harvest and replant crops instantly.  
- **Chat Heads** – See who’s talking in chat.  
- **Xaero’s World Map** – Track your adventures with a dynamic, in-game world map.  

## ⚙️ Optimized for Smooth Gameplay
This Modpack integrates **performance boosters** like Sodium, Lithium, and C2ME for stable FPS and faster chunk loading — even with shaders and large bases.

## 🧭 Compatibility
- Minecraft **1.21.9**
- Fabric Loader
- Fully compatible with **Iris Shaders** and **OptiFine alternatives**
- Recommended RAM: **4 GB+**

## 💬 Credits
Thanks to all mod developers who made these experiences possible.  
Curated and tested by **CelduinX**.
